items.title: PCPs Slow to Use Inhibitors for Nondiabetic Heart Failure
items.description: While proven to help, primary care clinicians have been slow to use the drugs once considered only for patients with diabetes. Medscape Medical News

items.title: Measles Spreading in North-East London Schools
items.description: A major measles outbreak in north-east London has hospitalised children and exposed low vaccination uptake in parts of Enfield. Press Association
